violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors under and around in place equipement noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reachin cooler door gaskets noted not in good repair.

PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung. | PREMISES (1 pts): Lockers or other suitable storage facilities noted not provided for the storage of personal belongings. Do Not hang coats/jacket and other personal items on shelves that contain food and food items.
